title: Dynamic price and stock updates on variant selection

requirements.text: On the ProductDetail page, when the user selects a variant, dynamically update the displayed price and stock availability to reflect the selected variant's price and stock values without a page reload.

quotes: move on to dynamic price and stock updates when a variant is selected

acceptanceCriteria: The price shown on the product detail page updates immediately when a different variant is selected.
The stock status (in stock / out of stock count) updates immediately when a different variant is selected.
If the selected variant has zero stock, the Add to Cart button is disabled and an out-of-stock message is shown.
The initial render shows the price and stock of the first/default variant (or base product if no variant is pre-selected).
No backend call is triggered solely for the price/stock update — the data already present in the product query is used.

requirements.text: On the ProductCard component, when the user selects a variant (if variant selection is exposed on the card), update the displayed price and stock badge to reflect the selected variant's values.

quotes: dynamic price and stock updates when a variant is selected

acceptanceCriteria: Selecting a variant on a ProductCard updates the price displayed on that card.
Selecting a variant on a ProductCard updates the stock status badge on that card.
Changes are local to that card and do not affect other cards.

constraints: Do not add new backend queries solely for price/stock variant lookups — use data already returned by existing product queries.
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Adding new variant fields or changing the backend data model.
Persisting the selected variant between page navigations.
Real-time inventory sync from the backend triggered by variant selection.
